creator: sergey.dyatko@gmail.com
text:
scroll on xterm doesn't work after switch to window with (russian(?)) locale and back again

Fix: with xterm2.61 all works fine for me.
How-To-Repeat: [tiger@laptop]~%locale
LANG=ru_RU.KOI8-R
LC_CTYPE="ru_RU.KOI8-R"
LC_COLLATE="ru_RU.KOI8-R"
LC_TIME="ru_RU.KOI8-R"
LC_NUMERIC="ru_RU.KOI8-R"
LC_MONETARY="ru_RU.KOI8-R"
LC_MESSAGES="ru_RU.KOI8-R"
LC_ALL=

1) open xterm
2) open another xterm/browser/etc
3) make (2) active, switch language
4) go to (1) and type 'ls -la /dir/with/many/files'

on step 2 switch to En, do step 1, step 4, compare results
